heading: View Slow Query Logs
body:
To return query log line items for slow queries that the Performance Advisor and Query Profiler identify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas performanceAdvisor slowQueryLogs list [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas performanceAdvisor slowQueryLogs list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-performanceAdvisor-slowQueryLogs-list).
